allow: Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command 'Get-Process electron,node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Path -like '\\''*window-companion*'\\'' -or $_.ProcessName -eq '\\''electron'\\'' } | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep 1; \(Get-Process electron -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object\).Count')
